data.user_prompt: Best FHA lender in Florida for a first time home buyer with a 600 credit score?

sections.text:
Obtaining an FHA loan in Florida with a 600 credit score is feasible, as FHA guidelines permit a minimum credit score of 580 for a 3.5% down payment. ([mortgage-info.com](https://mortgage-info.com/blog/fha-loan-600-credit-score-2025?utm_source=openai)) However, individual lenders may have their own criteria, and some might require higher scores or additional documentation.

Here are several Florida-based lenders known for working with borrowers with credit scores around 600:

**[The Federal Savings Bank](https://www.google.com/maps/search/The+Federal+Savings+Bank%2C+Florida%2C+USA?utm_source=openai)**
_Florida, USA_
Offers FHA loans with a minimum credit score requirement of 600, catering to first-time homebuyers with low down payment options.

**[Jhenesis Mortgage](https://www.google.com/maps/search/Jhenesis+Mortgage%2C+Florida%2C+USA?utm_source=openai)**
_Florida, USA_
Specializes in FHA loans for Florida residents, accepting credit scores as low as 580 with a 3.5% down payment.

**[Ebenezer Mortgage Solutions](https://www.google.com/maps/search/Ebenezer+Mortgage+Solutions%2C+Tampa%2C+FL?utm_source=openai)**
_Tampa, FL_
Provides FHA loans with flexible credit requirements, including options for credit scores starting at 500 with a 10% down payment.

**[Knights Mortgage](https://www.google.com/maps/search/Knights+Mortgage%2C+Florida%2C+USA?utm_source=openai)**
_Florida, USA_
Offers FHA home loans with competitive rates and flexible credit requirements, assisting first-time buyers in Florida.

**[Home Financial Group](https://www.google.com/maps/search/Home+Financial+Group%2C+Florida%2C+USA?utm_source=openai)**
_Florida, USA_
Provides FHA home loans with low down payment options and flexible credit requirements, ideal for first-time homebuyers.

**[MyFloridaMortgages](https://www.google.com/maps/search/MyFloridaMortgages%2C+Florida%2C+USA?utm_source=openai)**
_Florida, USA_
A mortgage broker offering FHA loans with various programs, including options for borrowers with lower credit scores.

**Tips to Enhance Your Approval Chances:**

- **Debt-to-Income Ratio (DTI):** Aim to keep your DTI below 43%, as higher ratios may require compensating factors. ([mortgage-info.com](https://mortgage-info.com/blog/fha-loan-600-credit-score-2025?utm_source=openai))

- **Down Payment:** While 3.5% is the minimum, a larger down payment can strengthen your application.

- **Employment History:** Maintain a stable employment history, ideally in the same field for at least two years.

- **Compensating Factors:** Demonstrating savings reserves or a history of on-time rent payments can offset a lower credit score.

It's advisable to consult with multiple lenders to compare terms and find the best fit for your financial situation.
